question: 사업부별 원가 구성 분석
corrected_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN PROFIT_CTR = '0000001000' THEN '제지사업부' WHEN PROFIT_CTR = '0000002000' THEN '생활용품사업부' ELSE PROFIT_CTR END AS 사업부, SUM(ZAMT006) AS 재료비_펄프, SUM(ZAMT007) AS 재료비_고지, SUM(ZAMT012) AS 인건비, SUM(ZAMT016) AS 에너지비, SUM(ZAMT034) AS 매출원가계 FROM MOD_BOARD_PROFIT_ANALYSIS GROUP BY PROFIT_CTR ORDER BY 매출원가계 DESC
